FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $5650.00 AGAINST DENNIS MALLOY, SUBMITTED ON AUG-03-2012 BY CURTIS KARNOW. THE COURT CALLED THE LAW OFFICE OF MICHAEL KRUPPE AND WAS INFORMED THAT THE OFFICE WAS CLOSED AT THIS TIME. MR. CHRISTIAN MOLLOY WAS ALSO TOLD EARLIER BY THE DISCOVERY CLERK TO CALL COURT CALL AND BE CONNECTED TO DEPT. 302. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED.
